text: >> Hello. >> Yeah. >> Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care, Kentucky. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help without a pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? >> Yes. >> If you can give me just a moment, there's no obligation to buy anything right now. Can you just hear me out for a minute, please? >> I guess. >> Sorry. Could you please repeat how old you are? >> 50. >> Perfect. You are qualified for the plans. Just hold on for a second, please. Here we go. >> Thank you so much for holding on. My name is Peter, who are you next to? >> I'm doing just fine, Peter. >> All righty. So, sir, actually, I'm calling about the Hospital Indemnity Program. That is designed to help Medicare hold us to save one out of pocket medical expenses. And it may also-- >> I'm not on Medicare. I'm on Medicaid. >> You don't have Medicare? >> No. >> All righty, guys.
